title: Firewall + Scheduled Tasks + Log Center
softDeps: v0.3-websites-acme (only for the website-log subview, which is deferred out of v0.5 scope)

scope.firewall: ufw / firewall-cmd abstraction; rule CRUD; 60s apply-with-rollback safeguard; self-protect for panel + SSH ports; optional fail2ban integration
scope.scheduledTasks: in-process scheduler; 5 task types (shell, backup files, clean logs, restart service, http request); cron expression with builder UI; run-log per task
scope.logCenter: 5 sources (system, ssh, operation/audit, login, task); NOT website logs (deferred until v0.3)

criticalDecisions: Firewall MUST implement 60s confirm-or-rollback safeguard — without it the module is a net liability
Cron trimmed from 1Panel's 12 task types to 5; rest can be expressed via shell command
Operation/audit log table populated by every mutating REST endpoint — also serves as a security forensics tool
openQuestions: Audit log retention policy (default proposal: 30 days, daily partitions)
Cron UX: freeform + builder, or builder-only?
Logs menu placement: top-level 日誌 vs nested under 系統?
Firewall rule storage: SQLite mirror with metadata, or kernel-view-only?
